description_long: This object depicts a set of two rows of computer workstations, each separated by tall privacy partitions, typical of an internet cafe environment. Each station features a flat wooden desk, a large monitor, a keyboard, a mouse, a pair of speakers, and a desktop computer tower. Black office chairs with armrests are positioned at each station, and the entire setup is placed on a rectangular gray floor mat. The partitions are light gray with a subtle texture, providing visual separation between users. The arrangement is symmetrical, with four stations in total, two on each side facing each other, and the overall design is functional and modern.
description: A modern internet cafe setup with four computer workstations, each separated by tall privacy partitions and equipped with monitors, keyboards, and black office chairs on a gray mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing a single workstation with a monitor, keyboard, mouse, speakers, and chair, with privacy partitions on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the row arrangement of the workstations, highlighting the tall partitions and the alignment of chairs along the desks.
description_view_2: Direct view of two adjacent workstations, clearly showing the symmetrical setup and all computer equipment on the desks.
description_view_3: Rear side view focusing on the back of the partitions and the alignment of the workstations, with chairs visible on both sides.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Four computer stations are clearly visible, arranged in two rows with privacy partitions and all equipment in view.
